channel.title: Game Production on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Game Production on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Seeing The Game In The Prototype
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today, I want to talk about seeing the game in the prototype — Now.

item.title: Does More Dev Time Mean A Better Game?
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about does more Dev time mean a better game?

item.title: Game Production Stages
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about game production stages.
